title: Oriented Birds starts season on a high
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - After making their...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - After making their return to the Safa Eden Regional League, Oriented Birds FC opened their 2025/26 campaign in impressive fashion last Saturday.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - After making their return to the Safa Eden Regional League, Oriented Birds FC opened their 2025/26 campaign in impressive fashion last Saturday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Plettenberg Bay outfit cruised to a 3-1 victory over Black Cats (George) in an entertaining fixture at Kwanokuthula Stadium."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Carrying that momentum forward, the Birds edged Nelson Mandela University FC 1-0 in their second outing, securing back-to-back wins and announcing their intentions early in the season.","html":"Carrying that momentum forward, the Birds edged Nelson Mandela University FC 1-0 in their second outing, securing back-to-back wins and announcing their intentions early in the season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The former regional league champions spent the past two seasons competing in the Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League after being promoted to the semi-professional division during the 2022/23 campaign alongside Junction Rovers AFC (Cape Town).","html":"The former regional league champions spent the past two seasons competing in the Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League after being promoted to the semi-professional division during the 2022/23 campaign alongside Junction Rovers AFC (Cape Town)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"However, a lack of sponsorship and limited access to training facilities forced the club's management into a tough decision as they sold their ABC Motsepe League status to Cape Town's Sea Point Swift FC, also known as Hope FC."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oriented Birds' experienced goalkeeper, Zakhe Gxotho, told Knysna-Plett Herald that he found the opening matches \"very interesting\", especially with Safa Eden adding two more teams - Strikers FC and Flying Eagles FC - to the league.","html":"Oriented Birds' experienced goalkeeper, Zakhe Gxotho, told Knysna-Plett Herald that he found the opening matches \"very interesting\", especially with Safa Eden adding two more teams - Strikers FC and Flying Eagles FC - to the league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gxotho praised the squad's work ethic and unity, noting that the team \"performed well as a unit and showed real desire for the game\". He said the Birds are training hard and are working to ensure \"everything is in order\" for the long season ahead.","html":"Gxotho praised the squad's work ethic and unity, noting that the team \"performed well as a unit and showed real desire for the game\". He said the Birds are training hard and are working to ensure \"everything is in order\" for the long season ahead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna teams off to a flying startKnysna football fans were treated to an exciting weekend as local teams delivered standout performances. After a difficult 2024/25 season, FC United bounced back brilliantly, scoring seven goals across their opening fixtures.","html":"Knysna teams off to a flying start
Knysna football fans were treated to an exciting weekend as local teams delivered standout performances. After a difficult 2024/25 season, FC United bounced back brilliantly, scoring seven goals across their opening fixtures."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"United opened with a convincing 3-0 victory over Simunye before maintaining their momentum later in the afternoon with a 4-0 win against newly promoted Paris United from George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Voota FC, formerly known as Knysna Celtics FC, also made a statement, collecting maximum points from their two opening matches.","html":"Voota FC, formerly known as Knysna Celtics FC, also made a statement, collecting maximum points from their two opening matches."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Regional league weekend results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Smuts United 1-1 Infantry School","html":"Smuts United 1-1 Infantry School"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Strikers 2-1 La liga","html":"Strikers 2-1 La liga"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Voota 4-0 Simunye","html":"Voota 4-0 Simunye"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FC Rebels 4-6 Infantry School","html":"FC Rebels 4-6 Infantry School"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fast Eleven 1-0 Flying Eagles","html":"Fast Eleven 1-0 Flying Eagles"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bitou Young Pirates 0-1 Black Cats","html":"Bitou Young Pirates 0-1 Black Cats"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Smuts United 3-4 Moonlight","html":"Smuts United 3-4 Moonlight"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"De Rust United 0-5 Sea Birds","html":"De Rust United 0-5 Sea Birds"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FC Rebels 2-5 Moonlight","html":"FC Rebels 2-5 Moonlight"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Voota 2-1 Paris United","html":"Voota 2-1 Paris United"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"De Rust United 3-2 Flying Eagles","html":"De Rust United 3-2 Flying Eagles"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fast Eleven 2-1 Sea Birds","html":"Fast Eleven 2-1 Sea Birds"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bitou Young Pirates 2-2 Nelson Mandela University","html":"Bitou Young Pirates 2-2 Nelson Mandela University"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ntokozo Nogom of FC United in action. Photo: Zama Gagu","html":"Ntokozo Nogom of FC United in action. Photo: Zama Gagu"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
